TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Qnau ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 60 buwan, 192 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 183 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 9 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 93%, Amis 1%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qnau hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Qnau hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Qnau hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qnau hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qnau hya' ga Babau. tay mkyahu' na Qnau hya' ga Ksunu'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qnau ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na qnau ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na qnau ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qnau ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na qnau ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na qnau ħjaʔ ɣa βaβau. taj mkjaħuʔ na qnau ħjaʔ ɣa ks~ɕunuʔ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Qnau ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 60 buwan, 192 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 183 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 9 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 93%, Amis 1%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qnau hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Qnau hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Qnau hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qnau hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qnau hya' ga Babau. tay mkyahu' na Qnau hya' ga Ksunu'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qnau ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na qnau ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na qnau ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qnau ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na qnau ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na qnau ħjaʔ ɣa βaβau. taj mkjaħuʔ na qnau ħjaʔ ɣa ks~ɕunuʔ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
